items.scenario: You are a member of a weekend pottery studio downtown. Last Saturday the kiln you booked was still cooling from an earlier class. You waited an hour before your pieces could be fired. The instructor apologized but offered no makeup time.
items.direction: Write an email to the studio manager. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain what happened with your kiln booking last Saturday
Explain how the delay affected the rest of your session
Suggest a way the studio could handle overlapping bookings
items.subject: Kiln booking delay

items.scenario: You are a subscriber to a weekly meal-kit delivery service. Your latest box arrived with two missing ingredients and a torn ice pack. The chicken inside was no longer cold. You had already planned your meals around that delivery.
items.direction: Write an email to the customer support lead. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the problems you found with your latest delivery
Explain how the missing items disrupted your week
Suggest how the company could prevent this from recurring
items.subject: Missing meal-kit items

items.scenario: You are a tenant on the fourth floor of a small apartment building. The hot water has been shutting off every morning for the past week. You have reported it twice by phone with no reply. Your mornings now start with cold showers.
items.direction: Write an email to the building manager. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the hot water problem you have experienced
Explain how it has affected your daily routine
Suggest a timeline for getting the repair done
items.subject: Morning hot water outage

items.scenario: You are organizing a two-day hiking trip with a close friend for next month. The cabin you both liked just raised its weekend rate. A cheaper cabin is available, but it sits farther from the trailhead. You need to decide soon.
items.direction: Write an email to your friend. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the change with the cabin you first chose
Explain the trade-off that comes with the cheaper option
Suggest which cabin the two of you should book
items.subject: Cabin options for hike
